tasks.title: TradingAgents KR Investment Briefing
tasks.prompt: Use $tradingagents-daily-investment-work in kr mode from the local C:\Projects\TradingAgents project. First acknowledge only a matching receipt visible in the prior task result, then prepare and render the complete Korean KR intraday investment briefing. Never acknowledge the current response in the same invocation, and never use Chrome or the ChatGPT web composer.
